Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"x":1}), dynamic({"y":2}) ] | mv-apply k = bag_keys(d) on (extend kk = k)
Sql: SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"x":1}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"y":2}'::JSON AS JSON))) AS t(d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_KEYS(CAST(d AS JSON))) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT *, k AS kk FROM (SELECT u.value AS k)) AS _sub

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}), dynamic([10,20,30]) ] | mv-expand d | project d
Sql: SELECT d FROM (SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (d), u.value AS d FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(LIST_VALUE(10, 20, 30) AS JSON))) AS t(d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.d IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.d AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.d), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.d, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.d] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "" ] | union (datatable(s:string)[ "c" ] | extend s=tostring(dynamic(null))) | extend e=isempty(s), n=isnull(s) | project s, e, n
Sql: SELECT s, e, n FROM (SELECT *, (s IS NULL OR CAST(s AS VARCHAR) = '') AS e, (s IS NULL) AS n FROM ((SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a'), ('')) AS t(s)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * EXCLUDE (s), TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS s FROM (VALUES ('c')) AS t(s))))
Detail: first differing row[2]: kusto=('', True, False) duck=(null, True, True)

Kql: range t from datetime(2021-12-26) to datetime(2022-01-02) step 1d | extend sow = startofweek(t), eow = endofweek(t), wd = dayofweek(t) / 1d, woy = week_of_year(t)
Sql: SELECT *, (DATE_TRUNC('week', t + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day') AS sow, (DATE_TRUNC('week', t + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day') + INTERVAL '7 days' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond' AS eow, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS wd, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM t) AS woy FROM (SELECT generate_series AS t FROM generate_series(TIMESTAMP '2021-12-26 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2022-01-02 00:00:00', (86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))

Kql: datatable(t:datetime)[ datetime(1601-01-01 00:00:00), datetime(0001-01-01 00:00:00.0000001), datetime(9999-12-31 23:59:59.9999999) ] | extend y = getyear(t), woy = week_of_year(t), dow = dayofweek(t) / 1d, eom = endofmonth(t)
Sql: SELECT *, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t) AS y, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM t) AS woy, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS dow, DATE_TRUNC('month', t) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond' AS eom FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '1601-01-01 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '0001-01-01 00:00:00.000000'), (TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59.999999')) AS t(t)

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"a":[1,2],"b":[3,4,5]}) ] | extend z = array_concat(array_slice(d.a, 0, 0), array_reverse(d.b)) | mv-expand z to typeof(long) | summarize s = sum(z), c = count()
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(z), 0) AS s, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (z), CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS z FROM (SELECT *, TO_JSON(LIST_CONCAT(json_extract(TO_JSON(LIST_SLICE(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.a'), '$[*]'), 0 + 1, 0 + 1)), '$[*]'), json_extract(TO_JSON(LIST_REVERSE(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.b'), '$[*]'))), '$[*]'))) AS z FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"a":[1,2],"b":[3,4,5]}'::JSON AS JSON))) AS t(d))) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.z IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.z) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.z AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.z) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.z), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.z, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.z] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"x":1,"y":2,"z":3}) | extend ks = bag_keys(d) | mv-expand k = ks to typeof(string) | extend val = toint(d[k]) | summarize sum(val)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(val), 0) AS sum_val FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS val FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS VARCHAR) AS k FROM (SELECT *, JSON_KEYS(d) AS ks FROM (SELECT '{"x":1,"y":2,"z":3}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.ks) AS u(value)))

Kql: print arr = dynamic([10,20,30,40,50]) | mv-expand with_itemindex=idx v = arr | project idx, v, prod = toint(v) * idx
Sql: SELECT idx, v, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(v AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(v AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) * idx AS prod FROM (SELECT t.*, u.idx AS idx, u.val AS v FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE(10, 20, 30, 40, 50) AS arr) AS t, LATERAL (SELECT UNNEST(t.arr) AS val, UNNEST(range(0, len(t.arr))) AS idx) AS u)

Kql: print s = '[{"id":1,"vals":[10,20]},{"id":2,"vals":[30]}]' | extend d = parse_json(s) | mv-expand o = d | mv-expand v = o.vals | summarize sum(toint(v)) by oid = tostring(o.id)
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(json_extract(o, '$.id') AS TEXT) AS oid, COALESCE(SUM(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(v AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(v AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER)), 0) AS sum_TRY_CAST_TRUNC_COALESCE_TRY_CAST_v_AS_DOUBLE_TRY_CAST_TRY_CAST_v_AS_BOOLEAN_AS_DOUBLE_AS_INTEGER FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS v FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS o FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(s AS JSON) AS d FROM (SELECT '[{"id":1,"vals":[10,20]},{"id":2,"vals":[30]}]' AS s)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.d IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.d AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.d), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.d, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.d] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN json_extract(o, '$.vals') IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(o, '$.vals')) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(json_extract(o, '$.vals') AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(o, '$.vals')) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(json_extract(o, '$.vals')), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(json_extract(o, '$.vals'), '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([json_extract(o, '$.vals')] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)) GROUP BY ALL

Kql: print d = dynamic({"x":[1,2],"y":[3,4],"z":[5,6]}) | extend flat = array_concat(d.x, d.y, d.z) | mv-expand f = flat to typeof(long) | summarize sum(f), avg(f)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(f), 0) AS sum_f, COALESCE(AVG(f), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS avg_f FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS f FROM (SELECT *, TO_JSON(LIST_CONCAT(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.x'), '$[*]'), json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.y'), '$[*]'), json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.z'), '$[*]'))) AS flat FROM (SELECT '{"x":[1,2],"y":[3,4],"z":[5,6]}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.flat IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.flat) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.flat AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.flat) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.flat), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.flat, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.flat] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: print d = dynamic([[1,2,3],[4,5,6]]) | mv-expand row = d | mv-expand cell = row to typeof(long) | summarize grand = sum(cell)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cell), 0) AS grand FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS cell FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS row FROM (SELECT '[[1,2,3],[4,5,6]]'::JSON AS d) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.d IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.d AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.d), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.d, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.d] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.row IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.row) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.row AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.row) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.row), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.row, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.row] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":1,"b":2,"c":3,"d":4}) | extend pairs = bag_keys(d) | mv-expand k = pairs to typeof(string) | order by k desc | summarize make_list(k), make_list(toint(d[k]))
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(LIST(k) FILTER (WHERE k IS NOT NULL), []) AS list_k, COALESCE(LIST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER)) FILTER (WHERE TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) IS NOT NULL), []) AS list_TRY_CAST_TRUNC_COALESCE_TRY_CAST_json_extract_d_k_AS_DOUBLE_TRY_CAST_TRY_CAST_json_extract_d_k_AS_BOOLEAN_AS_DOUBLE_AS_INTEGER FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS VARCHAR) AS k FROM (SELECT *, JSON_KEYS(d) AS pairs FROM (SELECT '{"a":1,"b":2,"c":3,"d":4}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.pairs) AS u(value) ORDER BY k DESC NULLS LAST)

Kql: print a = 1, b = 2 | extend c = pack("x", a, "y", b) | mv-expand kind=array c | project c | sort by tostring(c) asc
Sql: SELECT c FROM (SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (c), u.value AS c FROM (SELECT *, json_object('x', a, 'y', b) AS c FROM (SELECT 1 AS a, 2 AS b)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.c IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.c) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.c AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.c) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.c), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.c, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.c] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)) ORDER BY TRY_CAST(c AS TEXT) ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"k":1}), dynamic(null), dynamic([1,2,3]) ] | mv-expand d | project d
Sql: SELECT d FROM (SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (d), u.value AS d FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"k":1}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(NULL AS JSON)), (CAST(LIST_VALUE(1, 2, 3) AS JSON))) AS t(d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.d IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.d AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.d), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.d, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.d] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "2020-01-02 03:04","a1b2c3d4","nope" ] | project s, all=extract_all(@"(\d+)",s), all2=extract_all(@"(\d)(\d)",dynamic([1,2]),s)
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d+)') AS "all", LIST_TRANSFORM(range(1, GREATEST(LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 1)), LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 2))) + 1), lambda i: [REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 1)[i], REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 2)[i]]) AS all2 FROM (VALUES ('2020-01-02 03:04'), ('a1b2c3d4'), ('nope')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(k:long, s:string)[ 1,"a", 1,"", 1,"b", 2,"", 2,"" ] | summarize ml=make_list(s), ms=make_set(s), joined=strcat_array(make_list(s), "|") by k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(LIST(s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS ml, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS ms, ARRAY_TO_STRING(LIST(s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), '|') AS joined FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), ''), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), ''), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), '')) AS t(k, s) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: range t from datetime(2023-12-29) to datetime(2024-01-04) step 1d | extend sow = startofweek(t), eow = endofweek(t), som = startofmonth(t), soy = startofyear(t), woy = week_of_year(t), dow = dayofweek(t) / 1d
Sql: SELECT *, (DATE_TRUNC('week', t + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day') AS sow, (DATE_TRUNC('week', t + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day') + INTERVAL '7 days' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond' AS eow, DATE_TRUNC('month', t) AS som, DATE_TRUNC('year', t) AS soy, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM t) AS woy, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS dow FROM (SELECT generate_series AS t FROM generate_series(TIMESTAMP '2023-12-29 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-04 00:00:00', (86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))

Kql: print d1 = datetime_diff('microsecond', datetime(2020-01-01 00:00:00.0000020), datetime(2020-01-01 00:00:00.0000005)), d2 = datetime_diff('nanosecond', datetime(2020-01-01 00:00:00.0000002), datetime(2020-01-01 00:00:00))
Sql: SELECT DATE_DIFF('microsecond', TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000000', TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000002') AS d1, (DATE_DIFF('microsecond', TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000000') * 1000) AS d2

Kql: datatable(y:int, m:int, d:int)[ 2020,2,29, 2021,2,28, 2000,1,1, 1999,12,31 ] | extend dt = make_datetime(y, m, d), eom = endofmonth(make_datetime(y, m, d)), woy = week_of_year(make_datetime(y, m, d)), dow = dayofweek(make_datetime(y, m, d)) / 1d
Sql: SELECT *, MAKE_TIMESTAMP(y, m, d, 0, 0, 0) AS dt, DATE_TRUNC('month', MAKE_TIMESTAMP(y, m, d, 0, 0, 0)) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond' AS eom, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM MAKE_TIMESTAMP(y, m, d, 0, 0, 0)) AS woy, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM MAKE_TIMESTAMP(y, m, d, 0, 0, 0)) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS dow FROM (VALUES (2020, 2, 29), (2021, 2, 28), (2000, 1, 1), (1999, 12, 31)) AS t(y, m, d)

Kql: datatable(t:datetime)[ datetime(0100-02-28), datetime(0200-02-28), datetime(0400-02-29), datetime(1900-02-28), datetime(2000-02-29) ] | extend eom = endofmonth(t), dom = dayofmonth(endofmonth(t)), dow = dayofweek(t) / 1d
Sql: SELECT *, DATE_TRUNC('month', t) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond' AS eom, EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', t) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond') AS dom, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS dow FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '0100-02-28 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '0200-02-28 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '0400-02-29 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '1900-02-28 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '2000-02-29 00:00:00')) AS t(t)

Kql: datatable(a:datetime, b:datetime)[ datetime(2020-01-01 00:00:01.9999999),datetime(2020-01-01 00:00:00.0000001), datetime(2020-03-01 00:00:00),datetime(2020-02-29 23:59:59.9999999) ] | extend ds = datetime_diff('second', a, b), dms = datetime_diff('millisecond', a, b), span = a - b, spanticks = (a - b) / 1tick
Sql: SELECT *, DATE_DIFF('second', b, a) AS ds, DATE_DIFF('millisecond', b, a) AS dms, a - b AS span, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((a - b))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (((1 / 10.0) * INTERVAL '1 microsecond')))) AS spanticks FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:01.999999', TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000000'), (TIMESTAMP '2020-03-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2020-02-29 23:59:59.999999')) AS t(a, b)

Kql: datatable(t:datetime, s:timespan)[ datetime(2020-03-29 01:30:00),1h, datetime(2020-10-25 02:30:00),-1h, datetime(2024-02-29 23:00:00),2h ] | extend plus = t + s, minus = t - s, bin = bin(t, s), dow = dayofweek(t) / 1d
Sql: SELECT *, t + s AS plus, t - s AS minus, EPOCH_MS(CAST(FLOOR(EPOCH_MS(CAST(t AS TIMESTAMP))/EPOCH_MS(CAST(TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + (s) AS TIMESTAMP)))*EPOCH_MS(CAST(TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + (s) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS BIGINT)) AS bin, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS dow FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2020-03-29 01:30:00', (3600000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')), (TIMESTAMP '2020-10-25 02:30:00', (-3600000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')), (TIMESTAMP '2024-02-29 23:00:00', (7200000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond'))) AS t(t, s)

Kql: range t from datetime(2020-12-28) to datetime(2021-01-04) step 1d | extend woy = week_of_year(t), iso_dow = dayofweek(t) / 1d, sow = startofweek(t), eow = endofweek(t), som = startofmonth(t)
Sql: SELECT *, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM t) AS woy, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day'))) / EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))) AS iso_dow, (DATE_TRUNC('week', t + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day') AS sow, (DATE_TRUNC('week', t + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day') + INTERVAL '7 days' - INTERVAL '1 microsecond' AS eow, DATE_TRUNC('month', t) AS som FROM (SELECT generate_series AS t FROM generate_series(TIMESTAMP '2020-12-28 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-04 00:00:00', (86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":[{"b":[1,2]},{"b":[3,4,5]}]}) | mv-apply o = d.a on (mv-expand v = o.b to typeof(long) | summarize s = sum(v)) | summarize grand = sum(s)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s), 0) AS grand FROM (SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT '{"a":[{"b":[1,2]},{"b":[3,4,5]}]}'::JSON AS d) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN json_extract(d, '$.a') IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.a')) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(json_extract(d, '$.a') AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.a')) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(json_extract(d, '$.a')), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.a'), '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([json_extract(d, '$.a')] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS v FROM (SELECT u.value AS o) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN json_extract(o, '$.b') IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(o, '$.b')) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(json_extract(o, '$.b') AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(o, '$.b')) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(json_extract(o, '$.b')), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(json_extract(o, '$.b'), '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([json_extract(o, '$.b')] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))) AS _sub)

Kql: print d = dynamic([1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8]) | extend parts = array_split(d, dynamic([2,5])) | extend p0 = parts[0], p1 = parts[1], p2 = parts[2], np = array_length(parts)
Sql: SELECT *, parts[0 + 1] AS p0, parts[1 + 1] AS p1, parts[2 + 1] AS p2, LEN(parts) AS np FROM (SELECT *, LIST_TRANSFORM(range(0, LEN(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))) + 1), i -> LIST_SLICE(d, CASE WHEN i = 0 THEN 1 ELSE LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))[i] + 1 END, CASE WHEN i = LEN(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))) THEN LEN(d) ELSE LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))[i + 1] END)) AS parts FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8) AS d))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"vals":[1,2,3]}) | extend doubled = array_iff(dynamic([true,false,true]), d.vals, dynamic([0,0,0]))
Sql: SELECT *, TO_JSON(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_ZIP(LIST_VALUE(TRUE, FALSE, TRUE), json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.vals'), '$[*]'), LIST_VALUE(0, 0, 0)), x -> CASE WHEN x[1] THEN x[2] ELSE x[3] END)) AS doubled FROM (SELECT '{"vals":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS d)

Kql: print d = dynamic([10,20,30]) | mv-expand with_itemindex=i x = d | extend cum = array_sum(array_slice(d, 0, i)) + toint(x) | project i, x = toint(x), cum
Sql: SELECT i, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS x, cum FROM (SELECT *, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_SLICE(d, 0 + 1, i + 1), x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) + TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS cum FROM (SELECT t.*, u.idx AS i, u.val AS x FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE(10, 20, 30) AS d) AS t, LATERAL (SELECT UNNEST(t.d) AS val, UNNEST(range(0, len(t.d))) AS idx) AS u))

Kql: print d = dynamic([[1,2],[3,4],[5,6]]) | extend cols = array_concat(pack_array(d[0][0],d[1][0],d[2][0]), pack_array(d[0][1],d[1][1],d[2][1])) | extend colsum = array_sum(cols)
Sql: SELECT *, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(cols, x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS colsum FROM (SELECT *, LIST_CONCAT(LIST_VALUE(d[0 + 1][0 + 1], d[1 + 1][0 + 1], d[2 + 1][0 + 1]), LIST_VALUE(d[0 + 1][1 + 1], d[1 + 1][1 + 1], d[2 + 1][1 + 1])) AS cols FROM (SELECT '[[1,2],[3,4],[5,6]]'::JSON AS d))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":1,"b":2,"c":3,"d":4,"e":5}) | extend ks = array_sort_desc(bag_keys(d)) | mv-expand k = ks to typeof(string) | extend v = toint(d[k]) | summarize vals = make_list(v), keys = make_list(k)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(LIST(v) FILTER (WHERE v IS NOT NULL), []) AS vals, COALESCE(LIST(k) FILTER (WHERE k IS NOT NULL), []) AS keys FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS v FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS VARCHAR) AS k FROM (SELECT *, LIST_REVERSE_SORT(JSON_KEYS(d)) AS ks FROM (SELECT '{"a":1,"b":2,"c":3,"d":4,"e":5}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.ks) AS u(value)))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":[1,2,3],"b":[4,5,6]}) | extend zipped = zip(d.a, d.b) | mv-expand z = zipped | project lhs = toint(z[0]), rhs = toint(z[1]), prod = toint(z[0]) * toint(z[1])
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS lhs, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS rhs, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) * TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS prod FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS z FROM (SELECT *, TO_JSON(LIST_TRANSFORM(range(1, GREATEST(LEN(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.a'), '$[*]')), LEN(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.b'), '$[*]'))) + 1), lambda i: [json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.a'), '$[*]')[i], json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.b'), '$[*]')[i]])) AS zipped FROM (SELECT '{"a":[1,2,3],"b":[4,5,6]}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.zipped IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.zipped) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.zipped AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.zipped) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.zipped), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.zipped, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.zipped] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"type":"A","v":1}), dynamic({"type":"B","v":2}), dynamic({"type":"A","v":3}) ] | evaluate bag_unpack(d) | summarize sum(v) by type | sort by type asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT type, COALESCE(SUM(TRY_CAST(v AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS sum_v FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (d), d->>'$.type' AS type, d->>'$.v' AS v FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"type":"A","v":1}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"type":"B","v":2}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"type":"A","v":3}'::JSON AS JSON))) AS t(d))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY type ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print d = dynamic({"matrix":[[1,2,3],[4,5,6]]}) | mv-apply row = d.matrix on (extend rs = array_sum(row)) | summarize total = sum(rs)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rs), 0) AS total FROM (SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT '{"matrix":[[1,2,3],[4,5,6]]}'::JSON AS d) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN json_extract(d, '$.matrix') IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.matrix')) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(json_extract(d, '$.matrix') AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.matrix')) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(json_extract(d, '$.matrix')), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.matrix'), '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([json_extract(d, '$.matrix')] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT *, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(json_extract(CAST(row AS JSON), '$[*]'), x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS rs FROM (SELECT u.value AS row)) AS _sub)

Kql: print s = '[]' | extend e = parse_json(s) | extend al = array_length(e), s2 = array_sum(e), srt = array_sort_asc(e), keys = bag_keys(e)
Sql: SELECT *, LEN(json_extract(CAST(e AS JSON), '$[*]')) AS al, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(json_extract(CAST(e AS JSON), '$[*]'), x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS s2, TO_JSON(LIST_SORT(json_extract(CAST(e AS JSON), '$[*]'))) AS srt, JSON_KEYS(CAST(e AS JSON)) AS keys FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(s AS JSON) AS e FROM (SELECT '[]' AS s))
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('[]', [], 0, null, [], null) duck=('[]', '[]', 0, null, '[]', [])

Kql: print arr = dynamic([{"k":1},{"k":2},{"k":3}]) | mv-expand with_itemindex=i e = arr | extend tagged = bag_merge(e, pack("idx", i)) | project ki = toint(tagged.k), idx = toint(tagged.idx)
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(tagged, '$.k') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(tagged, '$.k') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS ki, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(tagged, '$.idx') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(tagged, '$.idx') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS idx FROM (SELECT *, JSON_MERGE_PATCH(CAST(e AS JSON), json_object('idx', i)) AS tagged FROM (SELECT t.*, u.idx AS i, u.val AS e FROM (SELECT '[{"k":1},{"k":2},{"k":3}]'::JSON AS arr) AS t, LATERAL (SELECT UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.arr IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.arr) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.arr AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.arr) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.arr), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.arr, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.arr] AS JSON[]) END) AS val, UNNEST(range(0, len(CASE WHEN t.arr IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.arr) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.arr AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.arr) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.arr), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.arr, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.arr] AS JSON[]) END))) AS idx) AS u))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"groups":[{"g":"x","items":[1,2]},{"g":"y","items":[3,4,5]}]}) | mv-apply grp = d.groups on (extend gs = array_sum(grp.items), gn = tostring(grp.g)) | project gn, gs | sort by gn asc
Sql: SELECT gn, gs FROM (SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT '{"groups":[{"g":"x","items":[1,2]},{"g":"y","items":[3,4,5]}]}'::JSON AS d) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN json_extract(d, '$.groups') IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.groups')) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(json_extract(d, '$.groups') AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.groups')) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(json_extract(d, '$.groups')), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.groups'), '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([json_extract(d, '$.groups')] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT *, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(json_extract(json_extract(grp, '$.items'), '$[*]'), x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS gs, TRY_CAST(json_extract(grp, '$.g') AS TEXT) AS gn FROM (SELECT u.value AS grp)) AS _sub) ORDER BY gn ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":[1,2],"b":[3,4],"c":[5,6]}) | extend ks = bag_keys(d) | mv-expand k = ks to typeof(string) | extend arr = d[k], s = array_sum(d[k]) | summarize grand = sum(s), allkeys = make_list(k)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s), 0) AS grand, COALESCE(LIST(k) FILTER (WHERE k IS NOT NULL), []) AS allkeys FROM (SELECT *, json_extract(d, '$.' || k) AS arr, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.' || k), '$[*]'), x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS s FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS VARCHAR) AS k FROM (SELECT *, JSON_KEYS(d) AS ks FROM (SELECT '{"a":[1,2],"b":[3,4],"c":[5,6]}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.ks) AS u(value)))

Kql: let L = datatable(k:guid, lv:string)[ guid(11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111),"a", guid(22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222),"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:guid, rv:string)[ guid(11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111),"x" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111' AS UUID), 'a'), (CAST('22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222' AS UUID), 'b')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111' AS UUID), 'x')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let a = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ]; let b = a | summarize count() by k; let c = b | extend Column1 = count_; let d = c | summarize count_ = sum(count_), Column1 = sum(Column1) by k; d | join kind=inner (b) on k | project k, count_, Column1, count_1 | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH a AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), b AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM a GROUP BY ALL), c AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, count_ AS Column1 FROM b), d AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(count_), 0) AS count_, COALESCE(SUM(Column1), 0) AS Column1 FROM c GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, count_, Column1, count_1 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.count_ AS count_1 FROM d AS L INNER JOIN b AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | summarize count() by k | as Stage1 | extend count_ = count_ + 100 | join kind=inner (Stage1) on k | project k, count_, count_1 | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH Stage1 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, count_, count_1 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.count_ AS count_1 FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (count_), count_ + 100 AS count_ FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL)) AS L INNER JOIN Stage1 AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let d = datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}), dynamic({"a":2,"b":[4,5]}), dynamic({"a":3,"b":[6]}) ]; let e = d | extend a = toint(d.a), arr = d.b; let f = e | mv-expand x = arr to typeof(long); f | summarize s = sum(x), cnt = count() by a | sort by a asc
Sql: WITH d AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"a":2,"b":[4,5]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"a":3,"b":[6]}'::JSON AS JSON))) AS t(d)), e AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.a') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.a') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS a, json_extract(d, '$.b') AS arr FROM d), f AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS x FROM (SELECT * FROM e) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.arr IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.arr) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.arr AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.arr) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.arr), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.arr, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.arr] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM f GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY a ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 ] | extend grp = i % 2 | partition by grp (summarize s = sum(i) | extend tag = "p") | sort by s asc
Sql: SELECT *, 'p' AS tag FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i), 0) AS s FROM (SELECT *, (((i) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) AS grp FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5), (6)) AS t(i))) ORDER BY s ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let d = datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"k":1,"vals":[10,20]}), dynamic({"k":2,"vals":[30]}) ]; let e = d | extend k = tolong(d.k), vals = d.vals; let f = e | mv-expand v = vals to typeof(long); let g = f | summarize total = sum(v), lst = make_list(v) by k; g | extend back = array_length(lst) | project k, total, back | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH d AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"k":1,"vals":[10,20]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"k":2,"vals":[30]}'::JSON AS JSON))) AS t(d)), e AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.k') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(d, '$.k') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS k, json_extract(d, '$.vals') AS vals FROM d), f AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS v FROM (SELECT * FROM e) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.vals IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.vals) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.vals AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.vals) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.vals), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.vals, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.vals] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)), g AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS total, COALESCE(LIST(v) FILTER (WHERE v IS NOT NULL), []) AS lst FROM f GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, total, back FROM (SELECT *, LEN(lst) AS back FROM g) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let m1 = materialize(range x from 1 to 4 step 1 | extend y = x * x); let m2 = materialize(m1 | where y > 2 | extend z = y + 1); m1 | join kind=inner (m2) on x | project x, y, y1, z | sort by x asc
Sql: WITH m1 AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, x * x AS y FROM (SELECT generate_series AS x FROM generate_series(CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)))), m2 AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, y + 1 AS z FROM m1 WHERE y > 2) SELECT x, y, y1, z FROM (SELECT L.*, R.x AS x1, R.y AS y1, R.z FROM m1 AS L INNER JOIN m2 AS R ON L.x IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.x) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print outer = 1 | extend inner = toscalar(datatable(n:long)[ 10, 20, 30 ] | summarize sum(n)) | extend ratio = inner / outer | extend both = outer + inner | project outer, inner, ratio, both
Sql: SELECT "outer", "inner", ratio, "both" FROM (SELECT *, "outer" + "inner" AS "both" FROM (SELECT *, "inner" / "outer" AS ratio FROM (SELECT *, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(n), 0) AS sum_n FROM (VALUES (CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(n) LIMIT 1) AS "inner" FROM (SELECT 1 AS outer))))

Kql: datatable(t:datetime, v:long)[ datetime(2021-01-01),10, datetime(2021-01-02),20, datetime(2021-01-03),30, datetime(2021-01-04),40 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = 0 on t from datetime(2021-01-01) to datetime(2021-01-05) step 1d | extend d = series_subtract(s, series_fill_const(s, 5)), m = series_multiply(s, s)
Sql: SELECT *, LIST_TRANSFORM(GENERATE_SERIES(1, LEAST(LEN(s), LEN(LIST_TRANSFORM(s, x -> COALESCE(x, 5))))), i -> s[i] - LIST_TRANSFORM(s, x -> COALESCE(x, 5))[i]) AS d, LIST_TRANSFORM(GENERATE_SERIES(1, LEAST(LEN(s), LEN(s))), i -> s[i] * s[i]) AS m FROM (SELECT LIST(COALESCE(s_val, 0) ORDER BY _ts) AS s, LIST(strftime(_axis._ts, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f') || '0Z' ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t FROM (SELECT UNNEST(range(TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-05 00:00:00', 86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')) AS _ts) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT EPOCH_MS(CAST(FLOOR(EPOCH_MS(t)/86400000)*86400000 AS BIGINT)) AS _bucket, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-02 00:00:00', CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-03 00:00:00', CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-04 00:00:00', CAST(40 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket)

Kql: datatable(t:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = 0 on t from 1 to 10 step 3 | extend gt15 = array_iff(series_greater(s, 15), s, -1)
Sql: SELECT *, LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_ZIP(LIST_TRANSFORM(s, x -> x > 15), s), x -> CASE WHEN x[1] THEN x[2] ELSE (-1) END) AS gt15 FROM (SELECT LIST(COALESCE(s_val, 0) ORDER BY _ts) AS s, LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t FROM (SELECT (1) + _i*(3) AS _ts FROM range(0, CAST(CEIL(((10) - (1))/(3)) AS BIGINT)) AS _r(_i)) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT ((1) + FLOOR(((t) - (1))/(3))*(3)) AS _bucket, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket)

Kql: datatable(t:long, v:long)[ 2,20, 4,40, 6,60 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = -7 on t from 1 to 8 step 1 | mv-expand idx = range(0, array_length(s)-1, 1) to typeof(long), s to typeof(long) | sort by idx asc
Sql: SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (s), CAST(u.v0 AS BIGINT) AS idx, CAST(u.v1 AS BIGINT) AS s FROM (SELECT LIST(COALESCE(s_val, (-7)) ORDER BY _ts) AS s, LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t FROM (SELECT (1) + _i*(1) AS _ts FROM range(0, CAST(CEIL(((8) - (1))/(1)) AS BIGINT)) AS _r(_i)) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT ((1) + FLOOR(((t) - (1))/(1))*(1)) AS _bucket, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(40 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(6 AS BIGINT), CAST(60 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket) AS t, LATERAL (SELECT UNNEST(GENERATE_SERIES(0, LEN(s) - 1, 1)) AS v0, UNNEST(t.s) AS v1) AS u ORDER BY idx ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}), dynamic([10,20,30]), dynamic({"nested":{"x":"y"}}), dynamic(null) ] | project v = array_sort_asc(d)
Sql: SELECT TO_JSON(LIST_SORT(json_extract(CAST(d AS JSON), '$[*]'))) AS v FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(LIST_VALUE(10, 20, 30) AS JSON)), (CAST('{"nested":{"x":"y"}}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(NULL AS JSON))) AS t(d))

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}), dynamic([10,20,30]), dynamic({"nested":{"x":"y"}}), dynamic(null) ] | project v = array_concat(d, dynamic([99]))
Sql: SELECT TO_JSON(LIST_CONCAT(json_extract(CAST(d AS JSON), '$[*]'), LIST_VALUE(99))) AS v FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(LIST_VALUE(10, 20, 30) AS JSON)), (CAST('{"nested":{"x":"y"}}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(NULL AS JSON))) AS t(d))

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}), dynamic([10,20,30]), dynamic({"nested":{"x":"y"}}), dynamic(null) ] | mv-expand d
Sql: SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (d), u.value AS d FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"a":1,"b":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(LIST_VALUE(10, 20, 30) AS JSON)), (CAST('{"nested":{"x":"y"}}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(NULL AS JSON))) AS t(d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.d IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.d AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.d), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.d, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.d] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)
